title: Execution String Telemetry Run v1
description: Single instant-fail death or kill cinematic event (execution_string) with before/after metrics and gating context.

version.description: Schema version for this execution_string run record.

schemaRef.description: Logical schema reference for routing and validation.

recordedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this execution_string was logged.

runId.description: Engine-local identifier for the current run or scenario.

sessionId.description: Opaque session identifier; no PII or player identity.

tier.description: Content tier for this run, aligned with spine tiers.

regionId.description: Region contract identifier where this execution occurred.

tileId.description: Tile or POI identifier within the region.

seedId.description: Optional seed or event contract ID associated with this execution_string.

personaId.description: Optional persona contract ID for the executing entity.

executionId.description: Stable identifier for the execution_string cinematic or pattern.

executionKind.description: High-level category of the execution (visceral, intimate, distant, systemic, etc.).

styleTags.description: Optional style-layer tags applied to this execution (e.g., gore, restraint, surreal).

source.description: Origin information for the execution_string decision.

killZoneId.description: Identifier for the kill-zone or trigger volume.

stateMachineId.description: Identifier of the state machine or behavior tree node that initiated the execution.

historyQueryId.description: Optional ID for the history layer query or selector decision that led to this execution.

invariantsSnapshot.description: Snapshot of key invariants at the moment the execution_string was triggered.

metricsBefore.description: Entertainment metrics just before control was revoked.

metricsAfter.description: Entertainment metrics sampled shortly after the cinematic completes or skips.

playerEnvelope.description: Optional snapshot of the player envelope at trigger time.

gate.description: Decision and distance metrics from the execution gate.

allowed.description: True if the full execution_string cinematic was allowed to play.

downgraded.description: True if the gate downgraded from full execution to a partial or non-lethal alternative.

distance.description: Normalized novelty/distance score used by the gate (e.g., relative to local history).

noveltyThreshold.description: Threshold value the gate compared distance against.

reason.description: Short machine-readable reason for the gate outcome.

safety.description: Safety-related flags and overflow indicators for this execution.

detOverflow.description: True if DET exceeded its configured cap during this event window.

cdlOverflow.description: True if CDL exceeded its configured cap during this event window.

arrTooLow.description: True if ARR after the event fell below the configured floor.

repetitionIndex.description: Zero-based count of how many times this executionId has fired in the current session.

repetitionLimitHit.description: True if a repetition cap was reached or exceeded for this executionId.

quality.description: Local quality scores for this execution_String event.

localScore.description: Local execution quality score derived from metric deltas and safety behavior.

deltaDET.description: DET contribution estimate for this event (if available).

notes.description: Optional short human/AI-facing note about perceived outcome (e.g., 'too long', 'high jolt').

extras.description: Extension point for lab-specific fields. Tier-1 consumers must ignore.
